race.comment: Race drops away quickly. AUSSIE ADAPTOR (5) stormed home to score maiden two back at Stony Creek then stormed home again there latest and just missed. Racing well and will be tough to stop. BUVELOT (3)  was well in the market at Pakenham last time and scored maiden win, coming home hard. Has upside and expected to run well again. OUR BEAU (1) is a lightly raced former Kiwi who is worth keeping safe. Maiden winner three back over 1200m on heavy ground. Has since been gelded and is fitter for three jump-outs. Watch the market closely. AUCKLAND (2) is mixing form but won only try course and distance and capable of sharp improvement. MACHINIST (4) will find this easier and can give a sight at odds.
